q: How do I access course materials after purchasing?
a: Once enrolled, you get lifetime access to videos, assignments, project files, and downloadable resources in your student dashboard.

q: Do I get a certificate upon completion?
a: Yes. Every course includes a verified completion certificate that can be downloaded, shared, and added to your LinkedIn profile.
Many courses include live mentoring sessions, Q&A calls, and project reviews. The schedule is updated inside the course page.
We support major cards, UPI, net banking, and EMI options depending on the payment provider configured for the course.

q: Can I get a refund if I am not satisfied?
a: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on eligible courses with no complicated steps or hidden fees.

q: Is there support for career guidance?
a: Yes. Learners get resume feedback, mock interview prep, and project portfolio advice as part of the mentoring track.

q: Do I need prior experience before starting?
a: No. Several courses are beginner-friendly and include foundation modules to help you ramp up quickly.

q: Can I learn at my own pace?
a: Absolutely. The platform is self-paced, so you can pause, resume, and revisit lessons whenever you want.
